name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability

labels: enhancement
assignees: maxencemeloni
---

## Intent

<!-- REQUIRED: Which kind of suggestion is this? -->

- [ ] **For users** — Agent Smith should *recommend* this in its reports (a tip, best practice, or warning)
- [ ] **For the tool** — Agent Smith's internal behavior, commands, or architecture should change

> See `CLAUDE.md` → *Understanding Suggestions* for why this distinction matters.

## Problem

<!-- What pain point or gap does this address? Describe the current behavior first. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What should Agent Smith do instead? Be specific about which command, pillar, or report section is affected. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out -->

## Scope Check

<!-- Agent Smith only analyzes what is user-configurable. Confirm this fits: -->

- [ ] This relates to something measurable from static files (CLAUDE.md, settings.json, hooks, commands, MCP configs, .claudeignore)
- [ ] This is **not** about Claude Code's system prompt, built-in tool schemas, model routing, or runtime behavior (these are out of scope)

## Pillar

<!-- Which of the 7 pillars does this touch? -->

- [ ] Security Posture
- [ ] Instruction Clarity
- [ ] Configuration Quality
- [ ] Context Efficiency
- [ ] Command & Extension Design
- [ ] Hook Safety
- [ ] MCP Integration
- [ ] N/A — general tool change

## Additional Context

<!-- Examples, references, links to related issues -->
